nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: de4rmolly, A hyperrealistic, ultra-detailed full-body photograph taken with an iPhone 17 Pro Max back camera (aspect ratio 3:4).  stands elegantly on a classic European stone balcony, looking directly at the camera with a confident, warm smile and slightly tilted head. She wears a form-fitting, onyx black floral lace mermaid gown with a deep scoop neckline that creates a pronounced hourglass silhouette. Her hair is in a polished, slicked-back bun and an ornate gold clutch in her left hand. Her pose is a statuesque S-curve, hips angled 45 degrees. The background features stone pillars and a luxurious cityscape during golden hour, with soft depth of field and city bokeh. The lighting is atmospheric, casting soft shadows to emphasize the intricate 3D lace texture against the pale stone. Sharp focus on the subject. Use photo reference for facial features. [ControlNet: OpenPose for S-curve, Depth for balcony spacing]
